summary: Extracted X/Twitter posts from V's history (516 total tweets + 29 note tweets). Applied filtering criteria for original content ≥50 chars. Reconstructed 23 threads through reply chain analysis. Output: 275 usable entries (180 original tweets, 43 quote tweets, 23 threads, 29 note tweets).
broadcast: X/Twitter source has 275 usable entries. Avg length: 224 chars. Thread reconstruction found 23 threads with substantial content.
learnings: X data includes both regular tweets (516) and note tweets (29 longer-form posts)
Thread detection via reply chains works well - found 23 substantial threads from reply metadata
Quote tweets (43) provide good commentary + URL context for training
Filtering criteria effectively removed retweets (135) and low-content posts (91 total filtered)
DuckDB timestamps come as datetime objects, not strings - handle parsing accordingly
